title: Playsound
description: The PlaySound mod allows you to play custom sounds in Minecraft using commands and shows an animation on the HUD, being open source for modification and improvement.
body:
inglish:
The PlaySound mod is an open-source Minecraft add-on that allows custom sounds to be played via commands and displays a visual HUD to indicate when a sound is played, enhancing the experience for mapmakers, server developers, and players.


español:
El mod PlaySound es un complemento de código abierto para Minecraft que permite reproducir sonidos personalizados mediante comandos y muestra un HUD visual para indicar cuándo se reproduce un sonido, mejorando la experiencia para creadores de mapas, desarrolladores de servidores y jugadores.
